item.title: Ferske spor: May 2026
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichmans musikkblogg in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . The summer solstice is fast approaching, so take these songs with you on your journey into the sunshine. Aemone – «Andalusia» (2022) Nice electronic house that you can take to the dance floor, barefoot of course. Ethereal and quite subtle vocal samples with clear rhythm so you can’t go wrong. Andalusia by Aemone 40 Winks – «40 layers» (It’s the trip, 2011)
